creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Conrad Meyer from comment #25)

Remove that change please;  it's unrelated and the comment is wrong anyway ;-)

-	/* finally update cached route in each socket via pfctlinput */
+	/* Finally, update the cached route in each socket via pfctlinput. */


Then feel free to go ahead and commit it to HEAD.   I'll deal with the other bits afterwards.
